caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Waves Impact Western Caribbean Today
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing moderate easterly winds sustained at 24 knots with wave heights reaching 6.2 feet and a swell period of 7 seconds. Rain chances remain moderate at 34 percent, while Martinique sees lighter winds near 12 knots with minimal impact.

mediterranean.headline: High Waves and Rain Challenge Haifa Maritime Operations
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa is experiencing a Small Craft Advisory with sustained winds of 20 kt and significant wave heights reaching 11.2 ft from the NNW, accompanied by an 80% chance of rain. These conditions present challenging navigation and docking scenarios for vessels operating in the port today.
